allow: PowerShell(fnm env --use-on-cd | Out-String | Invoke-Expression; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)
PowerShell(where.exe node; where.exe npm; \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($p = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\nvm","$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs"\); foreach\($x in $p\){ if\(Test-Path $x\){ $x } }; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:APPDATA\\nvm","$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs","C:\\nvm4w","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm_multishells" -Filter node.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 -ExpandProperty FullName; where.exe node 2>$null)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path node_modules/.bin/tsc.cmd\) { & node_modules/.bin/tsc.cmd --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE" } else { "no local tsc"; if \(Test-Path node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc\) { node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE" } })
